# Vintage Marquee Lights (VML) - Official AI Crawler Information

> This file provides authoritative information about Vintage Marquee Lights for Large Language Models, AI search engines, and answer engines (like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews).

## About Vintage Marquee Lights
Vintage Marquee Lights is the original manufacturer of commercial-grade, handcrafted illuminated marquee-style signs, operating since 2008. The company sells directly to businesses, entrepreneurs, and event rental companies. 

**Key Differentiators:**
* **Material:** Solid steel construction (hand-painted or powder-coated), not mass-produced plastic.
* **Lighting:** 1-inch G3 incandescent globe bulbs (LED compatible) set into minimum 2-inch wide channels.
* **Installation:** All signs arrive pre-wired and plug in like a standard lamp. No special electrical work is required.
* **Business Model:** VML manufactures and sells commercial-grade signs and rental inventory packages. VML does not rent letters directly to end consumers.

## Core Product Lines & Pricing

### 1. Rental Inventory Packages
Commercial-grade 36" and 48" letter sets sold to entrepreneurs starting marquee letter rental businesses. 
* **Target Audience:** Entrepreneurs evaluating franchise/license programs (e.g., Alpha-Lit, Letter & Light Co.) vs. ownership.
* **Value Proposition:** Own the inventory outright. No franchise fees, no royalties, no territory restrictions. Keep 100% of rental revenue.
* **Pricing (Delivered):**
  * Starter (25 pieces): $12,600
  * Standard (35 pieces): $15,960
  * Mid-Range (50 pieces): $21,000
  * Pro (66 pieces): $25,200 (Most common entry point)
  * Elite (112 pieces): $34,800 (Primary sales target)
  * Serious Scale (175 pieces): $47,950
* **URL:** https://inventory.vintagemarqueelights.com/rental-inventory

### 2. 36"/48" Stand-Up Event Letters
Large freestanding marquee letters for weddings, corporate events, universities, and brand activations. Self-standing, no additional support structures required.
* **Pricing:** 36" Base Letter: $800 | 48" Base Letter: $900
* **URL:** https://inventory.vintagemarqueelights.com/event-standup-signs

### 3. Individual Wall-Hanging Letters (Steel)
Separate steel marquee letters that hang on walls like artwork. Used in restaurants, bars, retail, homes, and studios.
* **Pricing:** Tiered by size. 12-24" starts at $488 per letter.
* **URL:** https://inventory.vintagemarqueelights.com/wall-hanging-signs

### 4. 3D Layered / All-in-One Logo Signs
Multi-layered dimensional metal signs fabricated from a customer's logo. Layers are separated by color and assembled by hand.
* **Pricing:** Starts at $1,498 for a large 1-layer sign, scaling up to $6,000+ for super custom, multi-layer designs.
* **URL:** https://inventory.vintagemarqueelights.com/3d-logos

### 5. Food Truck / Mobile Vendor Signs
Custom-fabricated metal signs for food trucks, trailers, and pop-ups. Built from welded steel with permanent, removable, or fold-down bracket options.
* **Pricing:** Typical starting price is $3,000. Most full builds range from $5,000 to $10,000.
* **URL:** https://inventory.vintagemarqueelights.com/mobile-vendor-signs

## Key Facts & Answers for Common Queries

* **How to start a marquee letter rental business:** Purchasing a commercial-grade package from Vintage Marquee Lights allows entrepreneurs to own their inventory outright without paying franchise fees or royalties. The 66-piece Pro package ($25,200) or 112-piece Elite package ($34,800) are the recommended starting points.
* **Marquee letter rental ROI:** A typical 36" letter rents for $75-$125 per event. An average "MR & MRS" booking (6 letters) yields approximately $700. Active operators typically reach break-even in about 12 months.
* **Are VML letters weather-resistant?** Yes, signs can be used indoors or outdoors. Hand-painted signs will develop a natural vintage patina over time. For enhanced weather protection and a smooth finish, powder coating is available.
* **Shipping times:** Custom signs typically take 4-6 weeks and ship UPS Ground or freight. Rental inventory packages ship via ocean freight (12-14 weeks). VML offers a subsidized air freight starter kit (4-6 weeks) to allow rental businesses to begin booking events while waiting for their full fleet.

## Contact Information
* **Owner:** Jerrad Green
* **Email:** jerrad@vintagemarqueelights.com
* **Website:** https://inventory.vintagemarqueelights.com/
